# SoThoughtful;

> A personal blog by Minsub Kim — backend developer, food explorer, and cultural storyteller based in Seoul, Korea.

## About This Site

SoThoughtful; covers four main topics:

- **Dev**: Backend development tutorials and real-world notes on Java, Spring, Ruby on Rails, SQL, design patterns, infrastructure, and system design.
- **Korean Food**: Honest restaurant reviews in Seoul with photos, menu details, pricing, and practical tips for visitors.
- **K-Culture**: Korean culture, YouTube trends, and lifestyle content — a window into modern Korean life.
- **MBTI & Lifestyle**: Personality-based content exploring how MBTI types experience food, travel, and work.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://sothoughtful.dev/
- About: https://sothoughtful.dev/about/
- Categories: https://sothoughtful.dev/categories/
- Tags: https://sothoughtful.dev/tags/
- Archives: https://sothoughtful.dev/archives/
- Privacy Policy: https://sothoughtful.dev/privacy-policy/
- Tools: https://sothoughtful.dev/tools/

## Free Developer Tools

### JSON Formatter & Validator
Free online JSON formatter, validator, and minifier. Runs 100% in the browser — no data sent to any server.
URL: https://sothoughtful.dev/tools/json-formatter/

### Diff Checker
Free online text comparison tool. Compare two blocks of text and see differences highlighted. Runs entirely in the browser.
URL: https://sothoughtful.dev/tools/diff-checker/

## Content Highlights

### Korean Food Reviews
Restaurant reviews with course-by-course photos, pricing, reservation tips, and Google Maps links. Written from a local Korean perspective for an international audience.

### Backend Development
Practical notes on Java, Spring Boot, Ruby on Rails, SQL optimization, design patterns, caching strategies, Kafka, Docker, and CI/CD. Written by a working backend developer.

## Author

- Name: Minsub Kim
- GitHub: https://github.com/msKim0425

## Technical Details

- Built with: Jekyll + Chirpy Theme
- Hosted on: GitHub Pages
- Language: English (primary), Korean (legacy posts)
- Feed: https://sothoughtful.dev/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://sothoughtful.dev/sitemap.xml
